title: Waist to Hip Ratio Calculator - Health Risk Assessment
description: Free waist to hip ratio (WHR) calculator. Assess your health risk based on body fat distribution. Simple measurement-based health indicator.
keywords: waist to hip ratio calculator, WHR calculator, body fat distribution, health risk assessment, waist hip measurement
intro: Calculate your waist-to-hip ratio to assess health risks related to body fat distribution. A simple but effective health indicator.

faq.q: What is a healthy waist to hip ratio?
faq.a: For men: below 0.90 is low risk. For women: below 0.80 is low risk. Higher ratios indicate increased cardiovascular risk.

faq.q: How do I measure my waist and hips?
faq.a: Measure waist at the narrowest point (usually at navel level). Measure hips at the widest point of your buttocks.
WHR indicates where you store fat. Abdominal fat (apple shape) is linked to higher risk of heart disease, diabetes, and stroke.
